name: Snusbase
description: Breach data search engine Tool: https://snusbase.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #762 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Snusbase output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
